issues.message: known-stale citation to a target that does not exist in the current corpus: urn:lex-mx:federal:statute:lraf:article:28-bis — Cites 'Artículo 28 Bis' of LRAF; no such article has existed in LRAF since its full 2014-01-10 rewrite (the same omnibus decree that added this LIC article). Never corrected.
